title: After Ferrari Luce backlash, Lamborghini CEO says canceling its own EV was the right choice
summary_full: Lamborghini CEO said the automaker's decision to kill its EV to focus on plug-in hybrid electric vehicles was "the right way to go" for his company.
summary_public: Lamborghini CEO said the automaker's decision to kill its EV to focus on plug-in hybrid electric vehicles was "the right way to go" for his company.
